creator: oleg@pobox.com
text:
A fetch error was reported while building devel/cppadvio:
 http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/devel.html#cppadvio
 
The distribution tarball cannot be fetched. 

The primary source for the tarball is currently specified as 
	http://www.lh.com/~oleg/ftp/packages/cppadvio-2.6.tar.gz
The computer www.lh.com no longer exists.

Could you please change the above link to read
	http://okmij.org/ftp/packages/cppadvio-2.6.tar.gz

Is it possible to arrange for the tarball to reside within
	ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/local-distfiles/ 
?

Thank you!

Fix: 

See the description section.
